# kCTFontSampleTextNameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontSampleTextNameKey ](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontSampleTextNameKey)

-  kCTFontSampleTextNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontSampleTextNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontSampleTextNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontSampleTextNameKey#Discussion)

The name specifier for the sample text name string.
